ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "spread" REAL /* Point spread for the game */,
  "home_rank" REAL /* Rank of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "away_rank" REAL /* Rank of the away team */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Names of the referees officiating the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "home_team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the home team coach */,
  "away_team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the away team coach */,
  "home_team_records" TEXT /* Record of the home team */,
  "away_team_records" TEXT /* Record of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being analyzed */,
  "advantage" REAL /* Calculated advantage for the game */,
  "adv_team" TEXT /* Team with the advantage */,
  "adv_bet" TEXT /* Betting odds associated with the advantage */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of money bet on the game */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet */,
  "bet_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the bet */,
  "bet_placed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who placed the bet */,
  "bet_placed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the bet was placed */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Status of the bet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_bet_placed_by FOREIGN KEY ("bet_placed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the team belongs */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home court */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "current_rank" REAL /* Current ranking of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
column_names: Final score of the home team
Final score of the away team
